must.title: Proper role attribute
must.description: Use role="dialog" or role="alertdialog" on modal container

must.title: Modal must be labeled
must.description: Use aria-labelledby pointing to heading or aria-label

must.title: Focus trap
must.description: Focus must remain within modal (Tab wraps to first/last focusable element)

must.title: Keyboard dismiss
must.description: Modal must be dismissible with Escape key

should.title: Initial focus management
should.description: Focus should move to first interactive element or heading on open

should.title: Restore focus on close
should.description: Return focus to triggering element after modal closes

should.title: aria-modal attribute
should.description: Add aria-modal="true" to help screen readers understand the modal boundary

avoid.title: Body scroll not locked
avoid.description: Don't allow scrolling of background content while modal is open

react.label: React Modal with Focus Trap

tests.title: Focus Trap Test
steps: Verify focus cycles within modal only

tests.title: Escape Key Test
steps: Verify modal closes and focus returns to trigger
